scope: Enumeration cases for ToolKit v78 action and automation-trigger parameter typePythonName values referenced by toolkit-v78-first-party-parameter-keys.json and toolkit-v78-trigger-parameter-keys.json. Descriptions are intentionally omitted; this is static local macOS 27 and iOS 27 Simulator metadata only. Dynamic user-local picker cases, such as personal Reminders lists or Contacts groups, are redacted.
